summary: Recovery Progress Indicator feature fully tested. All 10 backend tests passed, all frontend UI elements verified. Recovery indicator renders correctly on profile page for At Risk users, showing target status (Decaying), progress percentage (100%), progress bar, and requirement text. Both test users display 'Actions met — risk signals still active, keep posting authentic actions' message.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/position/{user_id} correctly returns recovery_progress object for At Risk/Decaying users
recovery_progress returns null for Rising/Stable users (as expected)
recovery_progress fields: current_status, target_status, requirement, progress, current, target
At Risk (risk signals): target_status='Decaying', target=3 public actions
At Risk with 3+ actions: shows 'Actions met — risk signals still active, keep posting authentic actions'
Progress field is float 0-1 (100% when current >= target)
Recovery indicator UI renders within ConsequencePanel with data-testid='recovery-indicator'
Recovery target label shows 'At Risk → Decaying' transition path (data-testid='recovery-target-label')
Recovery percentage shows '100%' when actions met (data-testid='recovery-pct')
Progress bar track is cyan colored (#00d4ff) (data-testid='recovery-bar-track')
Recovery section has separator line (border-top) from consequence panel above
ConsequencePanel still shows status, multiplier, meaning, next_step (regression passed)
Feed still loads with 20 action cards (regression passed)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All recovery indicator elements verified via browser automation)

test_credentials.user_1: newuser@test.com / password123 / user_id=05d47b99-88f1-44b3-a879-6c995634eaa0 (At Risk, 100% recovery, 'Actions met' message)
test_credentials.user_2: trust_fragile@test.com / password123 / user_id=0c98a493-3148-4c72-88e7-662baa393d11 (At Risk, 100% recovery, 'Actions met' message)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test users with active risk signals
context_for_next_testing_agent: Recovery Progress Indicator fully implemented within ConsequencePanel on profile page. Key points: 1) Only visible for Decaying/At Risk users (null for Rising/Stable). 2) Shows transition path (At Risk → Decaying) with progress bar and percentage. 3) Both test users have 3+ recent public actions so they show 100% progress with 'Actions met' message. 4) Progress bar uses cyan color (#00d4ff). 5) All data-testid attributes working: recovery-indicator, recovery-target-label, recovery-pct, recovery-bar-track, recovery-bar-fill, recovery-requirement. 6) get_recovery_progress() in utils/status_calculator.py handles all recovery paths.
